steps.title: Track the complex list
steps.content: The sentence lists artists followed by descriptive appositives. Because each item contains an internal comma between the artist's name and description, semicolons should separate the major list items.

steps.title: Place the separator
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma between complex items. Choice C puts the semicolon after the next artist's name, splitting that name from its description. Choice D omits the needed separator. The blank needs a semicolon before the next artist's name and a comma after it. The answer is B.
